excerpt: اَوَّلُ الفِکَر وَ آخِرُ العَمَل (the first in thought, the last in action)
After completing the six, he established himself upon his throne as the Divine Administrator, and the appointed celestial beings beneath him set the machinery of creation in motion.
source_location_hint: on the six cosmic motions and divine rest

excerpt: The Creator pronounced it and al-ʿĀshir brought it into being. The Divine Command operates in an instant—Be! and it is—whereas the Creator of the physical universe labored across six days.
one cannot remove the candle without its tablet—analogy for the inseparability of spiritual beings from physicality during transmutation
source_location_hint: on the first motion of descent

excerpt: the beings became divided into three sects according to their stance: some remained adamant in disobedience, others repented, yet others wavered in doubt
source_location_hint: on the three factions of descent

excerpt: the freezing of waters—when the command of descent was issued, beings fell downward from the subtle realm due to their density, for every dense thing falls downward by the law of gravity
source_location_hint: on anjamād al-māʾ and the descent of hylē

excerpt: these four forces complete the six dimensional axes: up, down, right, left, forward, back. For this reason, the entire physical world and all within it is encompassed in six dimensions.
source_location_hint: on the tajādhub al-qutbayn and six-dimensional cosmos

excerpt: the asdāf (celestial bodies' dense shells), which are also termed the abjam al-kawākib (stellar bodies)
source_work: al-Rahat al-ʿAql (The Repose of the Intellect)
source_location_hint: cosmological exposition on the formation of celestial envelopes

excerpt: From the parts of the Nadminite ones emerged the asdāf; from the remainder came forth the malefic natures
source_work: al-Masabih fi Ithbat al-Imama (The Lamps: On the Proof of the Imamate)
source_location_hint: exposition of celestial emanation and the origin of malefic stars

excerpt: When temperature and humidity reached equilibrium, the Sphere of Air was produced
source_location_hint: cosmological theory of elemental sphere formation

excerpt: As we descend into the earth's depths, temperature climbs until we approach Saqqara itself; as one descends deeper into waters or rises higher into the air, conditions become increasingly hostile to life
source_location_hint: explanation of the gradation of elemental natures and their habitability

excerpt: These two are called the Two Knots (ʿUqdatayn), prisons wherein the evil essences are held and chastened
source_location_hint: explanation of the lunar nodes as stations of malefic essences

excerpt: The entire era, beginning from when the first heaven commenced its governance, is attributed to that heaven and is termed the Great Cycle (dūr kabīr)
